name: Bio Petactive Herbal Flea & Tickguard Dog Shampoo - 250ml
description: Bio PetActive Herbal Guard Shampoo for Dogs helps protect and repel easily and effectively against fleas and ticks. Active ingredient: ? Neem oil 0.2% ? Lemongrass 1.53% ? Mint oil 0.45% Composition: Lemon Fragrance Shampoo contains Sodium Laurate Sulfate, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Coco-Glucoside, Glyceryl Oleate, Lemon Oil, Peppermint Oil, Neem Extract, Glycol Distearate, Cocoamide MEA, Laureth-10, Polysorbate 20, 5 -Chloro -methyl-4-isothiazolin-3-one, 2-methyl-2H-isothiazol-3-one, FD&C Yellow 5, salt, sodium hydroxide, EDTA and water. Properties: Bio PetActive Herbal Guard Shampoo cleanses, purifies and revitalizes dogs? fur. The cleansing substances and herbal oils in the composition of the shampoo moisturize the skin and repair it, leaving the dog?s skin and fur soft, shiny and healthy. The herbal oils in the shampoo composition help to protect and repel fleas and ticks easily and effectively, naturally.
